ksa_text: Skill in designing risk appetite statements for data and AI activities that are specific enough to guide operational risk decisions yet flexible enough to accommodate business evolution and emerging use cases.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA RM-S-008 (Risk Management/Skill) excluded as out_of_scope (composite 0.569, highest: NIST AI RMF at 0.569). Domain prior: out. Core hits: 0. OOS hits: 0. Seniority: appropriate. IC-level data quality analysis: profiling, quality rule authoring, reporting, exception handling, and quality metrics measurement.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Exclude consistent with out_of_scope classification, composite 0.569, and Risk Management (RM) handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge the exclusion of this Risk Management KSA for Data Quality Analyst?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Risk Management competencies do not appear as Data Quality Analyst requirements in job postings. They are allocated to specialist roles. Exclusion consistent with market patterns.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld by market evidence. Risk Management is not a Data Quality Analyst core competency. Final decision: exclude.
